channel.title: Blogging on Prabhat Reddy
channel.description: Recent content in Blogging on Prabhat Reddy

item.title: Setting up a blog with Hugo
item.description: This post is going to be part tutorial, part conversation, and part rant. If you have come here to know how to set up a blog using Hugo, please try not to get annoyed by the occasional rant. You have been warned. I have always wanted to start a blog, despite having no idea what to write about. One fine day I decided to just start a blog and decide later about what to write.
